source_notes: Information verified from official government/organizational websites. Phone numbers and emails sourced from official contact pages.

government_export_portals.name: Directorate General of Foreign Trade
government_export_portals.purpose: Formulation and implementation of Foreign Trade Policy; issuance of IEC, authorizations/scrips; export promotion
government_export_portals.head_office: Vanijya Bhawan, 'A' Wing, 16 Akbar Road, New Delhi - 110011

government_export_portals.name: Indian Trade Portal
government_export_portals.purpose: Single-point access for MFN/preferential tariffs, rules of origin, TBT measures, SPS notifications, export incentives
